---
name: App support request
about: Request built-in support for another streaming app
title: "Support: <app name>"
labels: enhancement
---

> Tip: you can already add unsupported apps yourself at runtime via
> **Settings → Add an app** (on-device discovery). This request is for *built-in*
> support shipped by default.

**App**
Name + package (e.g. `com.hbo.hbonow`).

**Inspector dump (if you can)**
Enable the debug Node Inspector, reach the Skip button, and paste the
`SkipperKitInspector` lines for the button — especially its `VIEW_ID=` and `TEXT=`.
That's exactly what's needed to add a verified config entry.

**Which buttons?**
Skip Intro / Skip Recap / Next Episode (and where they appear).
